vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách (thời thơ ấu)
vocab.example: During my formative years, long car journeys to the countryside were the highlight of my summer holidays.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thoát ly thực tại
vocab.example: Staring out the window at the passing landscapes provided a wonderful sense of escapism for me as a child.
To be honest, I didn't always enjoy car trips because I was quite prone to motion sickness on winding roads.

vocab.meaning: thời gian gắn kết chất lượng
vocab.example: Being confined in a car for hours actually fostered quality bonding time through family sing-alongs and word games.

vocab.meaning: tuyến đường có phong cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: My father always preferred the scenic route, which made the journey much more captivating for a curious kid like me.
I remember being mesmerized by the city lights blurring past the window during our nocturnal drives.

vocab.meaning: những cuộc cãi vã ở ghế sau (giữa anh chị em)
vocab.example: Our family trips were often characterized by minor backseat squabbles between my brother and me over personal space.
Occasionally, the interior of the car felt a bit stifling, especially during long hauls in the peak of summer.
The smell of old leather seats still manages to evoke nostalgia for the road trips we took in my grandfather's vintage sedan.
I loved the way new cities and terrains would slowly unfold before my eyes as we reached each destination.
